title: Simple Resourcepack Downloader
description: Allows you to download resourcepacks from servers.
body:
The saved resourcepacks will be in your default resourcepacks folder.

This Mod adds a button next to your resourcepacks button that allows you to download server resourcepacks.

On any server that has a resourcepack, open the Pause Menu and press Options. Next to the Resourcepack button should be a small download button. It will download the Servers Resourcepack into your default resourcepacks folder.
![screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0589eda1fd7b643680db4b2b59dfd61e8410fd1e.png)

# Automatic Downloading
Use the command

/srd autoDownload <true|false>

to enable or disable automatic resourcepack downloading. If enabled, resourcepacks will automatically be downloaded upon joining a server.

# Fabric API
The Fabric API is required for this Mod to work. It can be downloaded [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
